user_outcome: Loop, router, Implementer and Verifier paths use the shared command authority with exact dispatch counts, cycle routing and restart recovery.
rationale: After S13 establishes automated authority, every role path must consume it rather than reproducing maintainability phases locally. This slice makes the turnkey loop obey the same bounded lifecycle through crashes, FAIL, Coach routing, one resume, and terminal re-slicing.
in_scope: Route the Implementer through exactly one cycle preflight, optional remediation, and closure using the S13 authority, preserving PASS and FAIL commits and forbidding implementation edits after final maintainability PASS.

Route the fresh Verifier through exactly one read-only authoritative maintainability review of the pinned implementation_head after deterministic verification succeeds; the Verifier cannot remediate, adjudicate, rerun, commit unrelated code, or certify without the C-10 transition.

Make sworn loop and the router derive the next role from committed C-06 state: needs_coach stops and pages Coach but cannot synthesize decision, rationale, identity, permissions, citation identities, or time; resume_approved permits the one cycle-1 Implementer resume; re_slice_required stops for Planner; passed permits the normal downstream transition.

In cycle 1 compare structured finding disposition and Git-derived resumed authored paths to the immutable Coach-approved permitted_touchpoints: in-scope remediation receives one bounded edit and one closure, while re_slice or boundary expansion transitions immediately with zero remediation, closure, Verifier, or further Coach dispatch across loop, router, scheduler, and restart.
Make scheduler workers call the same loop transition authority and persist a terminal blocked or re-plan disposition instead of starting a second local retry policy.

Recover after process restart by first asserting the expected owner-track worktree path and branch, selecting the validated committed local owner-track head, resetting tracked bytes hard to that head and cleaning untracked debris, then reconstructing from committed report/status/journal and remote owner-track state, reusing exact S13 evidence and dispatching only a genuinely missing legal phase.

Assert exact Implementer, Verifier, and Coach-related model dispatch counts for clean PASS, cycle-0 preflight FAIL then closure PASS, authoritative FAIL then resume, cycle-1 FAIL, command crash, push failure, and restart.

Validate the C-19 portable board projection before resolving a release/track owner or dependency, while deriving worktree and Git identities from the locked naming convention rather than optional projection fields.
out_of_scope: The C-10 command engine, report transaction, and cutover validation belong to S13-maintainability-engine-cutover.
Track merge, release merge, ship, mark-shipped, and re-plan adapters belong to T6-release-adapters.
The loop does not auto-approve Coach adjudication or automatically invent a rollback/replacement plan.
Changing retry budgets for non-maintainability implement or verify failures is outside this slice.

effort_complexity.rationale: Four existing role/orchestration boundaries must converge on one durable FSM without changing unrelated retry semantics or fresh-context guarantees.

risks.description: Existing loop retries accidentally consume maintainability dispatch budget or rerun a committed phase after restart.
risks.mitigation: Route exclusively from validated C-06 state and C-05 invocation identity; table tests assert exact per-role counts across every cycle and restart transition.

risks.description: The fresh Verifier path gains repair or adjudication authority while being wired to the stateful engine.
risks.mitigation: Expose the Verifier adapter only to authoritative read-only review of the pinned head and assert zero source mutation and no Coach decision surface.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN sworn loop executes a clean cycle-0 slice from a T5 owner ref cut from the exact C-13-activated release-wt head THE SYSTEM SHALL invoke one Implementer preflight, zero closure reviews when preflight passes, one fresh Verifier authoritative review, and reach verified only after C-10 durably records authoritative PASS; planning authority or a pre-activation track SHALL stop before role dispatch (C-03, C-06, C-10, C-13, N-05, N-09, N-10).

WHEN cycle-0 Implementer preflight FAILs and in-scope remediation occurs THE SYSTEM SHALL permit exactly one closure review; IF closure PASSes THE SYSTEM SHALL freeze its implementation_head before fresh verification, and IF closure FAILs THE SYSTEM SHALL route needs_coach with no further Implementer or Verifier dispatch (C-05, C-06, C-10, N-05).

WHEN the fresh Verifier authoritative review FAILs in cycle 0 THE SYSTEM SHALL preserve the FAIL, clear implementation_head, stop at needs_coach, and page only the Coach adjudication surface without synthesizing any Coach-supplied or evidence-derived field; WHEN Coach later records resume_in_scope THE SYSTEM SHALL permit one cycle-1 Implementer path, while re_slice SHALL route only to the Planner (C-06, C-10, N-05).

IF cycle-1 preflight emits structured re_slice, names a required path outside immutable permitted_touchpoints, or Git-derived resumed authored paths exceed that boundary THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL immediately enter re_slice_required with zero remediation, closure, Verifier, or further Coach dispatch; IF the one in-scope remediation's closure or its Verifier review FAILs THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL do the same, preserving reports, cycle, adjudication, and finding identities identically across public loop, router, scheduler, and restart (C-05, C-06, N-05).

WHEN the loop process restarts after an interrupted attempt, any committed C-10 phase, or a commit-without-push THE SYSTEM SHALL first assert the exact owner-track worktree path and branch, reset tracked bytes to the validated committed local owner-track head, clean every untracked leftover, prove the worktree clean, then reconstruct the next legal transition, reuse exact committed evidence, dispatch zero already-completed phases, and complete a missing authorized push before continuing (C-05, C-06, C-10, N-10).

WHILE the Verifier adapter performs authoritative maintainability review, THE SYSTEM SHALL pass only the pinned implementation_head semantic artefacts into the fresh context, make no source/test/configuration edit, expose no remediation or adjudication callback, and refuse to mark verified when the C-10 transition is absent or non-PASS (C-06, C-10, N-05).
